'''Shining Hope''' was one of the three [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] cells operating in [[Shelsha sector/Legends|Shelsha sector]] around [[0 ABY/Legends|0.5 ABY]]. [[Thillis Slanni]] was its director of planning.

==Appearances==

}}
